betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Pumps§f

§aForce smoke downward and control exhaust flow direction!§f
§bPumps§f are specialized blocks in §9Advanced Chimneys§f that force smoke to travel downward, counteracting the natural upward rise of hot smoke. Each material type has a Pump variant (meta `:2`).

§6Key Features§f:
§b• Downward Flow§f: Forces smoke particles to move downward through connected vent systems, enabling underground or lower-level exhaust routing.
§b• Energy Requirements§f: Requires §e50 RF/s§f to operate, with an internal energy buffer of §e10,000 RF§f. The pump can also run without Forge Energy (configurable).
§b• Redstone Control§f: Supports redstone signal toggling. Can be configured to run on a high signal (default) or invert to run on a low signal.
§b• Crafting§f: Pump variants are crafted by surrounding a §bRepeater§f with vent blocks (meta `:1`) and a coal block in the center.

§eTip§f: Pumps are essential for routing smoke from basement-level furnaces or factories up through the ground level and out through roof chimneys.
